_README: Constructor parameters for SyndicateSaleV2, read by Deploy.s.sol. Economic caps are transcribed from the ratified parameter sheet (Model B SYN caps J13/§7a; J3 per-era address-cap ramp; J14 per-tx) and reserveThroughSeat is F2. initialRouter is intentionally NOT read here — Deploy.s.sol forces address(0) (day-one no referral; wire the CommissionRouter post-deploy via the timelocked path). All numeric values are JSON strings so big SYN caps (18dp) survive parsing.
